title: hydrocotyle bonariensis var. tribotrys
intro: Hydrocotyle bonariensis var. tribotrys, also known as Tribotris or a variety of the more commonly known Pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Hydrocotylaceae. The medicinal properties of Hydrocotyle bonariensis var. tribotrys include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the treatment of various health conditions such as hypertension and diabetes. Herbal preparations of Hydrocotyle bonariensis var. tribotrys include infusions, teas, and supplements that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
